description_long: This house features a complex, multi-sectioned structure with a prominent, multi-faceted roof composed of intersecting gable and hip elements. The exterior walls are finished in a dark color on some sides and a light color on others, with large, arched windows arranged in symmetrical rows across all visible facades. The roof is covered in textured shingles, and the house sits on a rectangular green lawn, suggesting a suburban or upscale urban setting. The main entryway is centrally located on the front facade, marked by a set of double doors beneath a large arched window. The house appears to have two full stories, with the upper and lower floors both featuring extensive window coverage. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, giving it a stately yet approachable appearance.
description: A two-story house with a complex, multi-gabled roof, large arched windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior walls, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, symmetrical arched windows, and dark exterior walls.
description_view_1: Side view revealing light-colored walls, intersecting roof sections, and a continuation of the arched window pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with light exterior walls, a long row of arched windows, and the most expansive section of the green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark walls, a large garage-style window section, and a clear view of the roof's complexity.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors beneath a large arched window, no porch or columns, simple and prominent entry
